intro: A field of silent dishes and great lenses still turns slowly toward the stars.
title: The Observatory
description: The old instruments are dusty but functional. Chart the heavens to map the routes ahead onto your World Map, or leave them be.

1.label: Chart the heavens
1.tooltip: (+) Reveal the onward routes onto your World Map
1.selected: You align the lenses and trace the constellations against the dark...

2.label: Leave the instruments
2.selected: You leave the silent dishes to their vigil.

charted: The routes ahead are charted onto your World Map. (Press M to view.)
